header.name: Ori Assia
header.title: Full Stack Developer
header.summary: Full Stack Developer at RelyOn.ai, an operational safety platform that connects end users with a live response team offering 24/7 service. Work spans a React Native mobile app, a Next.js operator console, and a Node.js/Firebase backend on GCP, with a focus on reliability and safe production rollouts.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Building and maintaining cross-platform emergency-response products across mobile, web, and backend systems.
bullets: Shipped updates to a cross-platform React Native app used by 5,000+ end users, including Twilio Voice and background geolocation integrations for emergency workflows.
Maintained and improved a real-time Next.js dashboard for emergency operators, with live map tracking and multi-tenant state management using Recoil and TanStack Query.
Maintained core safety features (SOS, geofencing) across 18 Firebase services and debugged cross-stack issues.
Set up structured logging (no PII), CI checks, internationalization (he/en/es), and product analytics via Mixpanel and LogRocket.

experience.title: Iron Dome Officer
experience.description: Iron Dome system operator, experienced commander, and instructor.

education.details: Intensive full-time program covering front-end and back-end development. Built and deployed full-stack applications with API integrations, database management, responsive design, state management, and RESTful services.

education.degree: High School - Major in Computer Science
